title: What if you could tell Anno what to do for final
display_title: What if you could tell Anno what to do for final
wikitext:
[]: What if you could tell Anno what to do for final? Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Fri Aug 26, 2016 9:01 pm Seeing as the wait for Final is going to be until the second coming, we might as well have some fun till then. Alright, here is the scenario, If you could make Anno do anything for Final, and he had to do it, no questions asked, what would it be? Hell, you could give him the entire script if you wanted, just give us your ideas of what Final should be IYHO. Have fun with it! SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: What if you could tell Anno what to do for final? Post by Reichu » Fri Aug 26, 2016 11:47 pm Isn't this basically the same premise as this thread with different phrasing?

[]: Re: What if you could tell Anno what to do for final? Post by zlink64 » Sat Aug 27, 2016 7:20 pm I wouldn't tell him anything except maybe "do you". His style seems unique to me. I wouldn't want to go f-it up.

[]: Re: What if you could tell Anno what to do for final? Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Sat Aug 27, 2016 7:34 pm Reichu wrote: Isn't this basically the same premise as this thread with different phrasing?

[]: Re: What if you could tell Anno what to do for final? Post by Reichu » Sat Aug 27, 2016 8:29 pm The responses are going to be so similar I don't see any reason to keep this open.
